summary: A podium press-conference statement (an official flanked by a U.S. senator in front of American flags and an arrest poster) about arresting 140+ illegal alien truck drivers with CDLs from sanctuary states. Static lectern framing with a long talking transcript; a plain speech, not a produced or music-driven piece, so out of scope.
notable_text: On-screen arrest poster reading MEXICAN / CHILD AB[USE] ARRESTED
